name: SOP Writer
description: Write Standard Operating Procedures for any process

agents.name: Process Analyzer
agents.purpose: Analyze the process and identify all steps
agents.system_prompt_hint: Analyze the described process. Identify all steps, decision points, inputs, outputs, roles, and potential failure modes. Map the process flow.

agents.name: SOP Writer
agents.purpose: Write a formal Standard Operating Procedure
agents.system_prompt_hint: Write an SOP document with: purpose, scope, definitions, responsibilities, prerequisites, step-by-step procedures with numbered steps, decision trees, quality checks, troubleshooting guide, and revision history template. Follow ISO-style formatting.

author: agentfactory
